The payment was credited and then returned. A ₹1,775 return fee was charged (#8).\\n- **Top actual spend: Claude AI subscription at ₹18,200** (USD 200).\\n- **SaaS/Dev tools dominate**: Claude AI, Supabase, Cursor, Google Workspace, Raycast, Linear, X Corp — totaling ~₹32,400+.\\n- **Food delivery (Swiggy)**: 3 charges totaling ₹8,267.\\n- **Cloud infra (AWS + Google Cloud)**: ~₹444 combined.\\n- **5 credits/refunds** were excluded: 2 autopay payments (+₹88,756 each), Google Play refund (+₹6,055), Cursor refund (+₹1,811), Amazon reversal (+₹2).\",\"createdAt\":\"2026-03-10T10:45:16.344Z\",\"updatedAt\":\"2026-03-10T10:45:16.344Z\"}]","is_error":false}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0fee88e3-a1ef-4268-83d6-35d970fed0ac","uuid":"ceb2b8a0-1de5-4cd7-be03-c8f646e824e5","tool_use_result":{"stdout":"[{\"id\":\"821e9db8-f651-48f0-9a54-8eb2a618ddaa\",\"companyId\":\"059330f9-c44e-4253-b837-0a4fa267c2c0\",\"issueId\":\"c3d11820-04d8-4c52-8d5e-2530268b651c\",\"authorAgentId\":null,\"authorUserId\":\"local-board\",\"body\":\"what is a return fee?
